description.zh-Hans: 根据 32/64 像素目标自动限制颜色数量、清理孤立杂点并整理透明度层级。
description.en: Automatically constrains the palette, removes isolated noise and cleans alpha levels for 32/64 px assets.

triggers.zh-Hans: 清理杂点, 像素太乱, 32像素整理, 64像素整理, 限制调色板
triggers.en: clean noisy pixels, 32px polish, 64px polish, limit palette

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 作为 AI 图像生成后的最后整理步骤，通常关闭抖色以保持干净色块。
exampleUsage.en: Use as the final cleanup after AI generation; keep dithering off for clean clusters.
